facility said it was diverted to the wrong place, but minutes later, Tim Cook (Apple
CEO) received a call from Samsung CEO explaining that they will pay $1 billion
dollars for the fine recently ruled against the South Korean company in this way.

and the promotion, has been extended to the global public welfare activites, from all over the world
have love and powerful people warm response. However, also see the special situation in some
areas, the Association forthe promotion of offical reservations in the Greater China region,

One, Beijing is a serious water shortage city, a massive challenge consume valuable drinking water.
Two, other large and medium-sized city China is also facing the grim situation of water resources.

Three, Chinese inland provinces of Henan, Hebei, parts of Shandong are not occur even in a hundred
years of drought, the dificulty in drinking water, ice challenge waste water can help a lot of people
sunive,

Four, the thrust of the activities is to help "gradually frozen people", funding has been part of the
solution, but the more communication is based on speculation and rigid index, has deviated from the
Purpose, or even no income students also follow the trend of the game, drifting further and further
away.

Five, star speculation, famous enterprises, marketing, product marketing, has deviated from the public
point of view.

In summary, ALS association is cautious and calm attitude forthe dissemination and promotion of the
Greater China region at least, love cannot be established in the majority of the people in conflict and
the pain of the real sentiment, not overdo sth.
